lines.english: Lesson 20
lines.chinese: 第20课
lines.raw: Lesson 20 | 第20课

lines.english: Pioneer pilots
lines.chinese: 拓荒飞行员
lines.raw: Pioneer pilots | 拓荒飞行员

lines.english: What was the name of the first plane to fly across the English Channel?
lines.chinese: 第一架飞越英吉利海峡的飞机叫什么名字？
lines.raw: What was the name of the first plane to fly across the English Channel? | 第一架飞越英吉利海峡的飞机叫什么名字？

lines.english: In 1908 Lord Northcliffe offered a prize of ￡1, 000 to the first man who would fly across the English Channel.
lines.chinese: 1908年，诺思克利夫勋爵悬赏1000英镑，奖给第一位飞越英吉利海峡的人。
lines.raw: In 1908 Lord Northcliffe offered a prize of ￡1, 000 to the first man who would fly across the English Channel. | 1908年，诺思克利夫勋爵悬赏1000英镑，奖给第一位飞越英吉利海峡的人。

lines.english: Over a year passed before the first attempt was made.
lines.chinese: 一年多过去了，才有人首次尝试。
lines.raw: Over a year passed before the first attempt was made. | 一年多过去了，才有人首次尝试。

lines.english: On July 19th, 1909, in the early morning,
lines.raw: On July 19th, 1909, in the early morning, | 1909年7月19日清晨，

lines.english: Hubert Latham took off from the French coast in his plane the 'Antoinette IV.'
lines.chinese: 休伯特·拉瑟姆驾驶他的“安托瓦内特四号”飞机从法国海岸起飞。
lines.raw: Hubert Latham took off from the French coast in his plane the 'Antoinette IV.' | 休伯特·拉瑟姆驾驶他的“安托瓦内特四号”飞机从法国海岸起飞。

lines.english: He had travelled only seven miles across the Channel when his engine failed and he was forced to land on the sea.
lines.chinese: 他飞越海峡仅七英里，发动机就失灵了，被迫降落在海面上。
lines.raw: He had travelled only seven miles across the Channel when his engine failed and he was forced to land on the sea. | 他飞越海峡仅七英里，发动机就失灵了，被迫降落在海面上。

lines.english: The 'Antoinette' floated on the water until Latham was picked up by a ship.
lines.chinese: “安托瓦内特”号浮在水面，直到拉瑟姆被一艘船救起。
lines.raw: The 'Antoinette' floated on the water until Latham was picked up by a ship. | “安托瓦内特”号浮在水面，直到拉瑟姆被一艘船救起。

lines.english: Two days later, Louis Bleriot arrived near Calais with a plane called 'No.XI'.
lines.chinese: 两天后，路易·布莱里奥带着一架名叫“十一号”的飞机抵达加来附近。
lines.raw: Two days later, Louis Bleriot arrived near Calais with a plane called 'No.XI'. | 两天后，路易·布莱里奥带着一架名叫“十一号”的飞机抵达加来附近。

lines.english: Bleriot had been making planes since 1905 and this was his latest model.
lines.chinese: 布莱里奥自1905年起就在制造飞机，这是他的最新型号。
lines.raw: Bleriot had been making planes since 1905 and this was his latest model. | 布莱里奥自1905年起就在制造飞机，这是他的最新型号。

lines.english: A week before, he had completed a successful overland flight during which he covered twenty-six miles.
lines.chinese: 一周前，他成功完成了一次陆上飞行，飞行距离达二十六英里。
lines.raw: A week before, he had completed a successful overland flight during which he covered twenty-six miles. | 一周前，他成功完成了一次陆上飞行，飞行距离达二十六英里。

lines.english: Latham, however, did not give up easily.
lines.chinese: 然而，拉瑟姆并没有轻易放弃。
lines.raw: Latham, however, did not give up easily. | 然而，拉瑟姆并没有轻易放弃。

lines.english: He, too, arrived near Calais on the same day with a new 'Antoinette'.
lines.chinese: 他也在同一天带着一架新的“安托瓦内特”号抵达加来附近。
lines.raw: He, too, arrived near Calais on the same day with a new 'Antoinette'. | 他也在同一天带着一架新的“安托瓦内特”号抵达加来附近。

lines.english: It looked as if there would be an exciting race across the Channel.
lines.chinese: 看来将有一场激动人心的跨海峡比赛。
lines.raw: It looked as if there would be an exciting race across the Channel. | 看来将有一场激动人心的跨海峡比赛。

lines.english: Both planes were going to take off on July 25th, but Latham failed to get up early enough.
lines.chinese: 两架飞机都准备在7月25日起飞，但拉瑟姆未能足够早地起床。
lines.raw: Both planes were going to take off on July 25th, but Latham failed to get up early enough. | 两架飞机都准备在7月25日起飞，但拉瑟姆未能足够早地起床。

lines.english: After making a short test flight at 4.15 a.m., Bleriot set off half an hour later.
lines.chinese: 在凌晨4点15分进行了一次短程试飞后，布莱里奥在半小时后出发了。
lines.raw: After making a short test flight at 4.15 a.m., Bleriot set off half an hour later. | 在凌晨4点15分进行了一次短程试飞后，布莱里奥在半小时后出发了。

lines.english: His great flight lasted thirty-seven minutes.
lines.chinese: 他这次伟大的飞行持续了三十七分钟。
lines.raw: His great flight lasted thirty-seven minutes. | 他这次伟大的飞行持续了三十七分钟。

lines.english: When he landed near Dover, the first person to greet him was a local policeman.
lines.chinese: 当他在多佛附近着陆时，第一个迎接他的是一位当地警察。
lines.raw: When he landed near Dover, the first person to greet him was a local policeman. | 当他在多佛附近着陆时，第一个迎接他的是一位当地警察。

lines.english: Latham made another attempt a week later and got within half a mile of Dover,
lines.chinese: 一周后，拉瑟姆又进行了一次尝试，到达了离多佛半英里以内的地方，
lines.raw: Latham made another attempt a week later and got within half a mile of Dover, | 一周后，拉瑟姆又进行了一次尝试，到达了离多佛半英里以内的地方，

lines.english: but he was unlucky again.
lines.chinese: 但他再次不幸。
lines.raw: but he was unlucky again. | 但他再次不幸。

lines.english: His engine failed and he landed on the sea for the second time.
lines.chinese: 他的发动机失灵了，他第二次降落在海面上。
lines.raw: His engine failed and he landed on the sea for the second time. | 他的发动机失灵了，他第二次降落在海面上。
